name: geepus
description: Geepus — a local-only LLM digital assistant
author: Geoff Baron

scripts.dist:full: node scripts/bake-full-bundle.mts && npm run build && GEEPUS_VARIANT=full electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:lite:signed: npm run build && GEEPUS_SIGN=1 APPLE_KEYCHAIN_PROFILE=${APPLE_KEYCHAIN_PROFILE:-geepus-notary} electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:full:signed: node scripts/bake-full-bundle.mts && npm run build && GEEPUS_VARIANT=full GEEPUS_SIGN=1 APPLE_KEYCHAIN_PROFILE=${APPLE_KEYCHAIN_PROFILE:-geepus-notary} electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.cjs
